global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with promotional text and app screenshots.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food options available nearby through the SnapMeal app.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'SnapMeal' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular screenshot of the app interface showing two food items in a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Additional app interface
elements.description: Another rectangular screenshot of the app interface featuring a food item, designed similarly to the first.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located at the center bottom of the ad, possibly representing a user-generated content feature.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby' centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in bold white font.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag displaying '€9.99' in white, located just above the call to action button.

elements.label: UGC indicator
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: SnapMeal, food delivery, interstitial, bright and modern, featuring app screenshots and promotional text.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by app screenshots in the center, with the main text below and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby, SnapMeal, Get offer, €9.99, UGC
